text: قَالَ‌ رَبِ‌ انْصُرْنِي‌ عَلَى‌ الْقَوْمِ‌ الْمُفْسِدِينَ‌

en.ahmedali: "O Lord, help me against the wicked people,"(Lot) prayed.
en.ahmedraza: He submitted, “My Lord! Help me against these mischievous people.”
en.arberry: He said, 'My Lord, help me against the people that work corruption.'
en.daryabadi: He said: my Lord! give me victory over the corrupt people.
en.hilali: He said: "My Lord! Give me victory over the people who are Mufsidun (those who commit great crimes and sins, oppressors, tyrants, mischief-makers, corrupts).
en.itani: He said, “My Lord, help me against the people of corruption.”
en.maududi: Lot said: “My Lord, aid me against these mischievous people.”
en.mubarakpuri: He said: "My Lord! Give me victory over the people who are corrupt."
en.pickthall: He said: My Lord! Give me victory over folk who work corruption.
en.qarai: He said, ‘My Lord! Help me against this corruptive lot.’
en.qaribullah: 'My Lord' he said, 'help me against this corrupt nation'
en.sahih: He said, "My Lord, support me against the corrupting people."
en.sarwar: He prayed, "Lord help me against the evil-doing people."
en.shakir: He said: My Lord! help me against the mischievous people.
en.transliteration: Qala rabbi onsurnee AAala alqawmi almufsideena
en.wahiduddin: Lot prayed, "Lord, help me against this wicked people."
en.yusufali: He said: "O my Lord! help Thou me against people who do mischief!"
fa.ansarian: گفت: پروردگارا! مرا بر این مردم فسادکار یاری ده.
fa.ayati: گفت: اى پروردگار من، مرا بر مردم تبهكار نصرت ده.
fa.bahrampour: گفت: پروردگارا! مرا بر قوم تبهكار نصرت ده
fa.fooladvand: [لوط] گفت: «پروردگارا، مرا بر قوم فسادكار غالب گردان.»
fa.ghomshei: لوط گفت: پروردگارا، مرا بر (محو) این قوم فاسد یاری کن.
fa.khorramdel: (لوط از آستانه‌ی خدا کمک طلبید و) گفت: پروردگارا! مرا بر قوم تباه پیشه پیروز گردان.
fa.khorramshahi: [لوط] گفت پروردگارا مرا در برابر تباهکاران یاری ده‌
fa.makarem: (لوط) عرض کرد: «پروردگارا! مرا در برابر این قوم تبهکار یاری فرما!»
fa.moezzi: گفت پروردگارا یاریم کن بر گروه بدکاران‌
fa.mojtabavi: گفت: پروردگارا، مرا بر اين مردم تباهكار يارى ده.
fa.sadeqi: (لوط) گفت: «پروردگارم! مرا بر قوم افسادگر یاری فرما.»
